creator: fullermd@over-yonder.net
text:
The plist update is incorrect; it deletes the compiled versions of the
.py files.  They're installed, so they need to be removed too  :)

Here's an updated patch; this sorts the plist for easier future
handling, and switches to the .tar.gz distfile to save some bandwidth
and drop a dependancy.


Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr/cvs/ports/security/py-paramiko/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.4
diff -u -r1.4 Makefile
--- Makefile	23 Jul 2007 10:39:02 -0000	1.4
+++ Makefile	25 Jan 2008 09:55:00 -0000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	paramiko
-PORTVERSION=	1.7
+PORTVERSION=	1.7.2
 CATEGORIES=	security python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lag.net/paramiko/download/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -19,6 +19,5 @@
 USE_PYTHON=	2.3+
 USE_PYTHON_PREFIX=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
-USE_ZIP=	yes
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr/cvs/ports/security/py-paramiko/distinfo,v
retrieving revision 1.3
diff -u -r1.3 distinfo
--- distinfo	27 May 2007 15:34:47 -0000	1.3
+++ distinfo	25 Jan 2008 09:55:02 -0000
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (paramiko-1.7.zip) = 11eb2a8688c6719a24a01f82153ffe4e
-SHA256 (paramiko-1.7.zip) = 352e8551fa91090fdf0e5e5dc598ac91e74a399f6db04cf97ee08bac519e88c1
-SIZE (paramiko-1.7.zip) = 353294
+MD5 (paramiko-1.7.2.tar.gz) = a1bbe4e318469869e0d4068be7e08f82
+SHA256 (paramiko-1.7.2.tar.gz) = 2f602d13a599c0c8c7f58c765ef72d4f07035833835b74da41f0ea3f8d3236de
+SIZE (paramiko-1.7.2.tar.gz) = 249053
